videoSnippet.title: Call The Ambulance! || Jorden vs Hans || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator

Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Van Foreest, Jorden (2705) - Niemann, Hans Moke (2725)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.03.01
D41 Queen's Gambit Declined, Semi-Tarrasch, 5.cd

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 c5 5.cxd5 cxd4 6.Qxd4 exd5 7.e4 dxe4 8.Qxd8+ Kxd8 9.Ng5 Be6 10.a3 Nbd7 11.g3 Rc8 12.Bg2 Bc4 13.Ngxe4 Nxe4 14.Nxe4 Bc5 15.Bf4 f5 16.Nxc5 Re8+ 17.Be3 Nxc5 18.O-O-O+ Bd3 19.b4 Na4+ 20.Bc5 Nxc5 21.bxc5 Rxc5+ 22.Kb2 Re2+ 23.Kb3 Rb5+ 24.Ka4 Rbb2 25.Rxd3+ Ke7 26.Rhd1 Rxf2 27.Rd7+ Kf6 28.Bxb7 Rxh2 29.R1d6+ Ke5 30.Ra6 Rb6 31.Rxb6 axb6 32.Rxg7 h5 33.Bc6 Kf6 34.Rb7 Rh3 35.Rxb6 Rxg3 36.Be8+
